vocabulary.label: Process
vocabulary.description: Make sure to use the appropriate end-point for each of the datasets, e.g. for Landsat, Sentinel-3, etc.

vocabulary.label: Core
vocabulary.description: This is an OpenAPI definition of the SpatioTemporal Asset Catalog API - Core specification. Any service that implements this endpoint to allow discovery of spatiotemporal assets can be considered a ST

vocabulary.label: Collections
vocabulary.description: This is an OpenAPI definition of the SpatioTemporal Asset Catalog API - Collections specification. This is a subset of the STAC API - Features specification.

vocabulary.label: Features
vocabulary.description: This is an OpenAPI definition of the SpatioTemporal Asset Catalog API - Features specification. This extends OGC API - Features - Part 1: Core.

vocabulary.label: Item Search
vocabulary.description: This is an OpenAPI definition of the SpatioTemporal Asset Catalog API - Item Search specification.

vocabulary.label: Async Process
vocabulary.description: **NOTE:** _Asynchronous Processing API is currently in beta release._

vocabulary.label: Search
vocabulary.description: TPDI Service for Planet data is deprecated and will be sunset on November 11th, 2026.   Please use [Planet Item Search](https://docs.planet.com/develop/apis/data/reference/#tag/Item-Search) instead.

vocabulary.label: Product
vocabulary.description: TPDI Service for Planet data is deprecated and will be sunset on November 11th, 2026.   Please use [Planet Data API](https://docs.planet.com/develop/apis/data/reference/) instead.

vocabulary.label: Order
vocabulary.description: TPDI Service for Planet data is deprecated and will be sunset on November 11th, 2026.   Please use [Planet Orders API](https://docs.planet.com/develop/apis/orders/reference/) instead.

vocabulary.description: TPDI Service for Planet data is deprecated and will be sunset on November 11th, 2026.   Please use [Planet Orders API](https://docs.planet.com/develop/apis/orders/reference/) instead.
